posts.text:
These are the people I am sarcastically emulating btw LOL


Brian Atlas (@BrianAtlas)

I don’t believe this is representative. But who knows. 2-3 bodies at 23? No way lol. Many women have that by the time they finish high school. College girls will put up 10 their first freshman semester lol.



— https://nitter.net/BrianAtlas/status/2033292918912631201#m

"I'm sorry you are hung up on wanting to see source materials, but that's not how journalism works. If anything in our story was false, WIRED would correct the story."

You keep saying this, but it's not an argument. You have been kicked out of mainstream publications in the past for your dishonesty, so there's no reason to trust you now. <3

"The proof is our story. We explain that the creators were paid by 1630, which is backed up our source material: interviews, contract copies, internal e

"Creators can make unsubstantiated claims like that, but it's a fact that the contracts did prohibit disclosure"

Then quote it. You said during our conversation that it was your editoral choice to remove the quotes/references. Quote the part of the contract that says it now.

"They're outlined in the article. Read it again."

They're not. It's a really sparse and poorly put together article.

"- They were being paid by 1630 fund (see above answer on disclosure)"

The 1630 fund is a fiscal spons

Sure, literally the second paragraph of your "article" seems to have a few.

Multiple creators have come out saying there was no "secrecy" about being paid, and I've yet to see any "restrictions on what sort of political content the creators could produce."

Here's a question - did you see language in any early contracts that said creators were not allowed to disclose they were being paid by Chorus? And did you see any language that gave them restrictions on what sort of political content they c

I get my foreign policy takes from @ComicDaveSmith 
I get my laughs from @KonstantinKisin 
I get my dog training tips from @hasanthehun 
I get my health advice from @RFKJr_Official 

I am retarded.

Okay I exaggerated it’s probably closer to 25%, you got me. 😔


Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

40% of college aged women absolutely do not do OnlyFans. OF would love to have that many MAUs. Does this guy just go online and make stuff up all day?
Community note: Destiny was joking making fun of PROFESSOR JIANG and Sneak0 x.com/AutismCapital/…



— https://nitter.net/TaylorLorenz/status/2033363817330049483#m

me when I find out my son has been talking to minors online 😞

Video

lmao, so obvious that women are lying in this data, if I had to guess I'd say the average bodycount of a woman in college at this point is ~50 bodies at least (remember, 40% or so of college aged women do OnlyFans now)


Aella (@Aella_Girl)

In my data, here's the median sexual partners by age and gender:





— https://nitter.net/Aella_Girl/status/2033272622558085598#m

I'm not sure tbh, it's pretty disappointing that @WIRED would publish something of such low quality, especially when there are so many strong claims made in the article that are entirely unsubstantiated, but maybe they have a slant that I'm just not aware of since I don't read too many articles from them.


Gerard Ciepielewski (@Gravtum)

What’s the process for reaching out to Wired to request a retraction? I’m familiar with their work, and I don’t think Lorenz’s article represents it well. My i

Also the reason she says this now is because she didn’t think I’d oblige her invite for a third conversation lol. No one wants to talk once they realize the kid gloves are off.


Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

I think he thinks when I said I’d hand his ass to him a 3rd that I’d waste my time on his stream. Which is very funny bc it’s an acknowledgement that he got his ass handed to him twice. But no, we can all just debunk u here. It’s good for ppl to see how ignorant he is in public



— https:

Taylor you don’t even understand what 230 is about, I listened to you stumble through that convo with Pisco and it was embarrassing.

Smart to avoid any critical conversations on your malicious reporting, though, following in the footsteps of all the other cancers plaguing alternative media right now.


Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

I’m sure you are because you don’t work. I am covering the senate’s big 230 hearing/discussion this week, something you have said absolutely nothing about. I know y

I’m free on Tuesday if you are. :)


Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

If you want to get your ass handed to you a third time publicly I’ll happily oblige.



— https://nitter.net/TaylorLorenz/status/2032853989029478492#m

I wonder if she'd say the same things today (she probably would)

Video

The MAGA mindset: If Trump succeeds it’s genius, if he fails it’s sabotage.

Video

Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

I know the entire internet has explained this to you, but Omidyar Network is not a dark money group. The funding is public and my non partisan journalism fellowship was disclosed. Chorus DID work w a dark money group (1630 fund) to run an UNDISCLOSED dark money influence scheme



— https://nitter.net/TaylorLorenz/status/2032854170605076568#m
